majorEndings.name: Domination
majorEndings.description: Seize the power of the Nexus to impose order on the realm by force. The Abyss is sealed permanently, but at the cost of free will for all living things bound to the Sap.

majorEndings.name: Harmony
majorEndings.description: Unite the factions and find a balanced way to coexist with the Abyss. The Scar remains but is contained through collective vigilance and mutual cooperation.

majorEndings.name: Sacrifice
majorEndings.description: Give your life to close the Scar forever, becoming one with the Nexus. The world is saved, but your companions must carry on without you.

majorEndings.name: Collapse
majorEndings.description: The Nexus shatters and the old order falls. The world is fundamentally changed, magic fades, and mortals must forge a new path without the Sap's guidance.

eras.name: The Chosen Awakens
eras.description: The player awakens in the Canopy of Life with fragmented memories. Guided by an Elder Treespeaker, they learn the basics of combat, the Sap, and the world's delicate balance. First encounters with corrupted wildlife hint at a growing darkness beneath the surface.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Fallen Guardian
keyChoicePoints.description: A corrupted forest guardian begs for mercy. Kill it to end its suffering or attempt a risky purification ritual.

consequences.mercy_kill: Gain combat reputation, Bloomguard approval. Guardian's mate becomes hostile later.
consequences.purification_attempt: Risk taking corruption damage. If successful, gain a nature ally and Wildkin Pact approval.

keyChoicePoints.name: Elder's Secret
keyChoicePoints.description: Discover the Elder is hiding knowledge about the Abyss. Confront them or keep silent.

consequences.confront_elder: Learn partial truth early, Elder becomes wary. Unlocks alternate dialogue paths in Era 3.
consequences.keep_silent: Elder trusts you more, grants bonus supplies. Truth is delayed until Era 4.

climaxEvent.name: The First Corruption Surge
climaxEvent.description: A wave of Abyss energy erupts from beneath the Canopy, corrupting a section of the forest. The player must fight through corrupted creatures and seal a minor breach.

eras.name: Roots of Corruption
eras.description: The player descends into the Hollowroot Catacombs to investigate the source of corruption. Ancient ruins reveal fragments of the world's true history. The first major Abyss breach tears open, and the Thornmaw Dryad emerges as a twisted guardian of the deep roots.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Hollowroot Prisoners
keyChoicePoints.description: Find imprisoned Sporecaller researchers in the catacombs. Free them or leave them as potential Abyss threats.

consequences.free_prisoners: Sporecallers become available as faction allies. One prisoner is secretly corrupted and causes problems in Era 3.
consequences.leave_imprisoned: Sporecallers are hostile in Era 3 but corrupted prisoner threat is avoided.

keyChoicePoints.name: Thornmaw's Plea
keyChoicePoints.description: The Thornmaw Dryad reveals it was once a protector, corrupted against its will. It begs you to find another way.

consequences.destroy_thornmaw: Clean resolution, earn Bloomguard respect. Lose potential ally.
consequences.attempt_cure: Difficult skill check. Success: powerful ally in Act 3. Failure: Thornmaw escapes, returns stronger in Era 5.
consequences.bind_thornmaw: Thornbinder technique. Thornmaw serves reluctantly but may betray you in Era 5.

narrativeThemes: The cost of the first Unbinding

climaxEvent.name: The Thornmaw Dryad
climaxEvent.description: Boss encounter with the corrupted Thornmaw Dryad deep in the Hollowroot Catacombs. The first major Abyss breach tears open during the fight, raising the stakes and forcing a critical moral decision.

eras.name: The Faction Wars
eras.description: The six factions of the realm vie for influence as the Abyss threat grows. The player must navigate political intrigue, forge alliances, and choose sides. Each faction offers a different philosophy on how to deal with the corruption. Exploration expands to new regions.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Faction Summit
keyChoicePoints.description: Represent your chosen faction at a summit to determine the realm's response to the Abyss. Your persuasion and past actions influence the outcome.

consequences.military_response: Bloomguard leads. Aggressive but effective short-term. Civilian casualties in Era 4.
consequences.magical_containment: Emerald Coven leads. Buys time but drains the Sap reserves dangerously.
consequences.diplomatic_unity: All factions contribute. Slow but builds toward Harmony ending.
consequences.research_priority: Sporecallers/Sapling Consortium lead. Discovers Unbinding truth faster but leaves borders undefended.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Spy
keyChoicePoints.description: Discover a faction spy within your allied faction. Expose them publicly, turn them as a double agent, or let them continue unknowing.

consequences.expose_spy: Allied faction gains security. Enemy faction becomes more hostile and unpredictable.
consequences.turn_double_agent: Gain intelligence advantage. Risk of being discovered leads to trust crisis in Era 4.
consequences.ignore_spy: Spy feeds misinformation that alters Era 4 events. Can be leveraged if discovered later.

keyChoicePoints.name: Border Village Dilemma
keyChoicePoints.description: A village on the faction border is threatened by both Abyss creatures and rival faction soldiers. You cannot save both the village and stop the faction advance.

consequences.save_village: Gain civilian support and side quest access. Rival faction gains territory, complicating Era 4.
consequences.stop_faction_advance: Strategic victory but village is destroyed. Survivors become refugees who may help or hinder in Era 5.

climaxEvent.name: The Betrayal at Greenveil
climaxEvent.description: During a joint faction operation, one faction betrays the alliance. The player must choose who to support in the chaos, permanently altering faction relationships.

eras.name: The Unbinding Truth
eras.description: The midpoint twist: the original Unbinding that created the current world order was not a heroic act but a catastrophic mistake. The 'heroes' of legend were desperate fools who tore reality trying to gain power. This revelation recontextualizes every faction's beliefs and forces the player to reconsider their alliances.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Unbinding Revelation
keyChoicePoints.description: You discover the truth about the first Unbinding. Share this knowledge with your faction, keep it secret, or use it as leverage.

consequences.share_truth: Faction is shaken but adapts. Some members defect. Opens path to Harmony or Collapse endings.
consequences.keep_secret: Maintain stability but carry the burden. Opens path to Sacrifice ending.
consequences.leverage_truth: Gain power but lose trust if discovered. Opens path to Domination ending.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Canopy Under Siege
keyChoicePoints.description: The Abyss launches a massive assault on the Canopy of Life. Choose to defend the Canopy, evacuate civilians, or launch a counter-strike at the Abyss source.

consequences.defend_canopy: Canopy survives but weakened. Many soldiers lost. Canopy available as base in Act 3.
consequences.evacuate_civilians: Civilians saved but Canopy falls. Must find new base. Civilian gratitude provides resources in Act 3.
consequences.counter_strike: Risky gamble. Success weakens Abyss significantly. Failure means heavy losses on both fronts.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Veilkeeper's Offer
keyChoicePoints.description: A Veilkeeper offers forbidden knowledge about how to permanently close the Scar, but the method requires sacrificing an innocent soul.

consequences.accept_knowledge: Gain crucial intel for Act 3 but carry moral weight. Companion may leave.
consequences.refuse_knowledge: Maintain moral standing. Must find harder path in Era 5.
consequences.find_alternative: Extended quest chain in Era 5. If completed, gain knowledge without sacrifice.

climaxEvent.name: Siege of the Canopy
climaxEvent.description: The Abyss forces launch a full-scale assault on the Canopy of Life. Multiple fronts, faction coordination (or lack thereof), and the Unbinding truth collide in an epic battle that reshapes the political landscape.

eras.name: The Scar Opens
eras.description: The final faction path crystallizes as the Scar—the wound in reality left by the original Unbinding—tears fully open. The player must explore the Scar itself, a nightmarish landscape where the rules of reality break down. The Veilkeeper storyline reaches its climax as their true nature and purpose are revealed.

keyChoicePoints.name: Veilkeeper Judgment
keyChoicePoints.description: The Veilkeepers are revealed as fragments of the original Unbinding practitioners. Judge their fate.

consequences.destroy_veilkeepers: Removes their influence but loses ancient knowledge. Simplifies final battle.
consequences.redeem_veilkeepers: Difficult path. Veilkeepers become allies for final battle. Opens unique ending variation.
consequences.absorb_power: Gain immense power but risk corruption. Shifts toward Domination ending.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Scar's Heart
keyChoicePoints.description: At the heart of the Scar, you find the original point of the Unbinding. You can attempt to heal it, weaponize it, or leave it as a passage between worlds.

consequences.heal_scar: Requires immense sacrifice. Locks out Collapse ending. Moves toward Harmony or Sacrifice.
consequences.weaponize_scar: Turns the Scar into a weapon against the Void Architect. Moves toward Domination.
consequences.leave_passage: Maintains status quo. All endings remain available but final battle is harder.

keyChoicePoints.name: Companion's Sacrifice
keyChoicePoints.description: Your closest companion offers to stay behind in the Scar to hold the passage open while you proceed. Refuse and find another way, or accept their sacrifice.

consequences.accept_sacrifice: Companion is lost. Passage remains stable. Emotional weight carries into finale.
consequences.refuse_sacrifice: Must find alternative, harder path. Companion survives. Passage is unstable in Era 6.

climaxEvent.name: The Veilkeeper Unmasked
climaxEvent.description: The true nature of the Veilkeepers is revealed in a dramatic confrontation. Their connection to the original Unbinding and their centuries of manipulation come to light, forcing the player to make a judgment that will echo into the final era.

eras.name: Convergence
eras.description: All paths converge in the final confrontation. The Void Architect—the entity that has been feeding on the Scar's energy since the original Unbinding—manifests fully. Every choice, alliance, and sacrifice culminates in the battle for the realm's future. Four major endings await, each with three variations based on accumulated choices.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Void Architect's Bargain
keyChoicePoints.description: The Void Architect offers a deal: merge with it to gain ultimate power and reshape reality, or fight it in a battle that may cost everything.

consequences.accept_merge: Domination ending path. You become the new architect of reality.
consequences.refuse_and_fight: Standard final battle. Outcome depends on accumulated allies and power.
consequences.counter_offer: Only available with specific prerequisite choices. Can lead to unique Harmony variation.

keyChoicePoints.name: The Final Unbinding
keyChoicePoints.description: After defeating or dealing with the Void Architect, one final choice determines the fate of the realm.

consequences.domination: Seize the Nexus. Seal the Abyss by force. Free will is curtailed but the realm is safe. Variation depends on faction path.
consequences.harmony: Unite all factions. Contain the Scar through cooperation. Variation depends on relationships and trust built.
consequences.sacrifice: Give your life to close the Scar forever. Variation depends on companion bonds and who survives.
consequences.collapse: Shatter the Nexus. Magic fades, mortals must forge their own path. Variation depends on how much infrastructure survives.

narrativeThemes: What does it mean to save the world

climaxEvent.name: The Void Architect
climaxEvent.description: The final confrontation with the Void Architect—an entity born from the original Unbinding that has been growing in the space between worlds. The battle incorporates mechanics from every system the player has mastered, and its outcome is shaped by every major choice made throughout the journey.

butterflyEffectChains.name: Thornmaw Legacy
butterflyEffectChains.description: The decision about the Thornmaw Dryad ripples through the entire game.

nodes.event: Thornmaw's fate affects Wildkin Pact and Thornbinder relations
Thornmaw returns as ally, enemy, or reluctant servant based on Era 2 choice
Thornmaw's final role in the battle changes based on accumulated trust/resentment

butterflyEffectChains.name: The Unbinding Truth
butterflyEffectChains.description: How and when the truth is revealed changes the endgame dramatically.

nodes.event: Factions react based on when and how they learned the truth
Available endings shift based on truth propagation

butterflyEffectChains.name: Faction Allegiance
butterflyEffectChains.description: Faction choices compound and create cascading political consequences.

nodes.event: Faction response to siege depends on accumulated reputation
Final faction path determined by cumulative choices
Ending variation within chosen ending depends on faction state
